title: feat(core): add video media type detection for prompt support
summary: Adds video media type detection via magic byte signatures for mp4, webm, flv, mpeg, quicktime, and 3gpp formats. Extends the existing detectMediaType utility with a new videoMediaTypeSignatures array and updates convert-file.ts to auto-detect video mediaType (with image fallback chain) when not explicitly provided. Also adds gs:// URL handling for video attachments. Includes comprehensive unit tests for detection, attachment conversion, and file part conversion. Changeset included. Closes #11743.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured community contribution. CodeRabbit reviewed and flagged a valid concern about EBML signature ambiguity (WebM audio vs video share the same magic bytes) — author addressed the feedback by adding documentation comments about detection limitations and implementing the image-first fallback chain as suggested. CI 'Setup' jobs pass but the actual test suites (Core, E2E, MCP, Memory, RAG, Combined stores) are stuck in PENDING — likely need maintainer secrets/approval to run. Vercel deploy checks fail due to authorization (expected for external forks). The 4 commits include: initial implementation, CodeRabbit feedback fixes, changeset, and a recent merge from main. No merge conflicts. Needs a maintainer to approve CI runs and perform a human review.
